允许
专辑名称：Paper Towns (Music from the Motion Picture)
艺术家名：Various Artists
发行年份：2015年
大小：393.02 MB
文件数：20 个文件
类型：音乐(Music)
类别：原声(OST)
格式：FLAC 分轨
媒介：CD
制作组：
来自：转载
标签列表：欧美 流行(Pop) 原声(OST)
转载规则：其他情况(参考副标题及种子简介的标注语)
试听：
简介
专辑介绍：
Quentin Jacobsen has spent a lifetime loving the magnificently adventurous Margo Roth Spiegelman from afar. So when she cracks open a window and climbs back into his life-dressed like a ninja and summoning him for an ingenious campaign of revenge-he follows. After their all-nighter ends and a new day breaks, Q arrives at school to discover that Margo, always an enigma, has now become a mystery. But Q soon learns that there are clues-and they're for him. Urged down a disconnected path, the closer he gets, the less Q sees of the girl he thought he knew.
曲目列表：
1. Santigold – Radio (3:10)
2. Twin Shadow – To the Top (3:17)
3. Sam Bruno – Search Party (3:48)
4. Kindness – Swingin Party (3:58)
5. Vance Joy – Great Summer (3:42)
6. Vampire Weekend – Taxi Cab (3:57)
7. Son Lux – Lost It To Trying (Paper Towns Mix) (4:06)
8. Saint Motel – My Type (3:26)
9. Galantis – Runaway (U & I) [Svidden & Jarly Remix] (3:23)
10. HAIM – Falling (4:19)
11. Grouplove – No Drama Queen (2:44)
12. De Lux – Moments (6:12)
13. Alice Boman – Be Mine (3:27)
14. The Mountain Goats – Used To Haunt (2:43)
15. The War on Drugs – Burning (5:46)
16. Nat & Alex Wolff – Look Outside (2:56)
其它版本 0 个其它版本
